reviews: The CSE (Cyber Security) program at SVIT provided a solid foundation in both core computer science subjects and cybersecurity topics like ethical hacking, cryptography, and network security. The course structure was balanced between theory and practi

Placement Experience:SVIT provides good placement opportunities for general IT roles, but students aiming for niche fields like Cyber Security need to take initiative, upskill themselves, and explore off-campus options. The college is improving slowly, and I believe future batches will benefit more if industry tie-ups are strengthened.
